---
title: "The History of a Bit of Bread: Being Letters to a child on the life of man and of animals"
---

## The History of a Bit of Bread: Being Letters to a child on the life of man and of animals

**Author:** Margaret Gatty
**Date:** 1864-1865
**Imprint:** London: Saunders and Otley

### Notes

A translation of Jean Macé, <i>Histoire d’une bouchée de pain : lettres à une petite fille sur la vie de l’homme et des animaux</i> (1861).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
